name: forge
description: Forge — Personal AI Operating System for building software projects

_phase_dependency_notes.phase_5: self-test harness — no new deps (uses Node http for mock)
_phase_dependency_notes.phase_9: kb + research — adds @lancedb/lancedb, pdf-parse, cheerio, gpt-tokenizer, node-fetch
_phase_dependency_notes.phase_10: react frontend — separate workspace under web/apps/forge-workspace/
_phase_dependency_notes.phase_11: existing project intake — adds tree-sitter + 9 grammars, dependency-cruiser, multer, adm-zip, ignore
